backend/main.mo: Main actor for the wedding invitation app; defines data types and CRUD operations for invites (create, read, update) and RSVP submissions, using blob storage for media and a map for persistence.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that converts old invite records (with plain Text photo fields) to new records using `Storage.ExternalBlob` types, mapping all fields and resetting image data to empty blobs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the chunked photo upload feature, listing affected frontend files, related components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's purpose and recent changes, serving as a quick reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Hindu Wedding Invitation Website Builder' and mounting the app at `#root`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes: landing (`/`), invite creator (`/create`), and invite display (`/invite/:id`), plus a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepCoup: Form step component for entering couple details (bride/groom names, wedding date, tagline) with validation error display and a read-only default RSVP thank-you message.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepEven: A form step component for adding, editing, and removing wedding schedule events (name, time, venue, address), with an empty state placeholder and dynamic list rendering.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepGall: A form step component for uploading and reordering a photo gallery (with drag-and-drop and upload progress) and uploading background music for the invitation.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepPhot: A form step component providing individual photo uploaders for bride, groom, and cover photos, with local preview, upload progress, and error handling via ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepPubl: A form step component that publishes the invitation via a mutation hook, generates a shareable URL, and displays a success state with share options and a preview link.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepTemp: A form step component that displays a grid of available invitation templates with light/dark variant toggle, highlighting the selected template with a checkmark.
frontend/src/components/effects/Drifting: A canvas-based animation component that renders drifting, rotating petal particles across the viewport, respecting the user's reduced-motion preference.
frontend/src/components/effects/Floating: A decorative component that wraps an image with a filigree frame overlay and applies a floating CSS animation, skipping animation when reduced motion is preferred.
frontend/src/components/effects/Glassmor: A simple presentational card component applying glassmorphism styling (backdrop blur, semi-transparent background, border) with optional dark mode variant.
frontend/src/components/effects/MouseTil: A wrapper component that applies a 3D perspective tilt effect to its children based on mouse position, with reduced motion support.
frontend/src/components/effects/Parallax: A wrapper component that translates its children vertically based on scroll position to create a parallax effect, respecting reduced motion preferences.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Backg: A fixed-position music player button that plays/pauses a looping audio track, requiring a user interaction before playback is enabled.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Count: Displays a live countdown timer to a wedding date with styled flip-unit cards for days, hours, minutes, and seconds.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Event: Renders a vertical alternating timeline of wedding schedule events with scroll-triggered fade-in animations and glassmorphism cards.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Invit: A side-effect-only component that dynamically sets Open Graph and Twitter meta tags in the document head based on the invite record.
frontend/src/components/invitation/RSVPF: A validated RSVP form that submits guest attendance details and triggers a confetti canvas animation on successful submission.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Share: Displays a QR code and a copyable URL link for sharing the wedding invitation, using an external QR code API.
frontend/src/components/landing/SampleIn: A clickable card component that previews a sample wedding invite with its template thumbnail, couple names, and date, navigating to the invite page on click.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main app layout wrapper with a sticky header (logo + 'Create Invitation' nav button), a main content slot, and a footer with branding and attribution.
frontend/src/components/templates/BaseTe: Shared base template component that renders the full wedding invitation UI (hero, countdown, events timeline, RSVP form, gallery, music, effects) using props for styling and invite data.
frontend/src/components/templates/DarkCo: Wedding invitation template with a deep-space cosmic aesthetic using dark navy/purple gradients and gold/lavender accents, delegating rendering to BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/components/templates/Floral: Wedding invitation template styled with warm marigold/orange floral gradients in light mode and deep brown tones in dark mode, delegating to BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/components/templates/Minima: Minimalist wedding invitation template using a soft cream/parchment palette with subtle gold radial accents, delegating rendering to BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/components/templates/RoyalR: Wedding invitation template with a royal Rajasthani aesthetic using deep crimson/maroon gradients and gold geometric SVG patterns, delegating to BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/components/templates/SouthI: Wedding invitation template styled with warm bronze/brown tones inspired by South Indian aesthetics, delegating rendering to BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/components/templates/Sunset: Wedding invitation template with a sunset beach color scheme of orange, yellow, and peach gradients, delegating rendering to BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/components/templates/Temple: Wedding invitation template with a temple/mandala aesthetic using deep burnt-orange and terracotta gradients, delegating rendering to BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/components/templates/ThreeD: Wedding invitation template with a mystical 3D floating divine look using deep purple/indigo radial gradients and gold/lavender accents, delegating to BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisted identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for listing sample invites, fetching a single invite, creating/updating invites, and submitting RSVPs via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useReducedMotion.ts: Custom hook that reads and persists a reduced-motion preference from localStorage and syncs it with the OS media query, toggling a CSS class on the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, defines a Hindu-wedding-themed OKLCH CSS variable palette, and provides utility classes for typography, glassmorphism, and color tokens.
frontend/src/lib/templateRegistry.ts: Defines the list of available wedding invitation templates with metadata and lazily imports their React components, exporting both the registry array and a component map keyed by template ID.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module providing class-name merging (cn), random ID generation, locale-aware date/datetime formatting, and a File-to-Base64 data URL converter.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreateInvitePage.tsx: Multi-step wizard page for building a wedding invitation, managing form state across template selection, couple details, photo upload, events, gallery/music, and publish steps, then assembling an InvitePayload for submission.
frontend/src/pages/InvitePage.tsx: Public invite viewer page that fetches an invite by ID and lazily renders the matching template component, with loading skeletons and a not-found fallback.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page featuring a hero section, how-it-works steps, and a grid of sample invite cards loaded from the backend, with animated petal effects and navigation to the creation flow.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Hindu Wedding app, extending the default theme with custom colors (gold, saffron, marigold, etc.), wedding-specific fonts (Cormorant, Cinzel, Playfair), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 7) describing the Hindu Wedding Invitation Website Builder's features, architecture, known issues (IC 2MB payload limit causing HTTP 413 on image upload), and fix requests for chunking/compressing Base64-encoded images.
